packages.description: Validate identifier/keywords name

packages.description: fully asynchronous, pure JavaScript implementation of the Parquet file format

packages.name: @fragaria/address-formatter
packages.description: Universal international address formatting in Javascript

packages.name: @googlemaps/google-maps-services-js
packages.description: Node.js client library for Google Maps API Web Services

packages.name: @googlemaps/url-signature
packages.description: Sign a URL for Google Maps Platform requests.

packages.name: @hono/node-server
packages.description: Node.js Adapter for Hono

packages.name: @hono/zod-openapi
packages.description: A wrapper class of Hono which supports OpenAPI.

packages.name: @hono/zod-validator
packages.description: Validator middleware using Zod

packages.name: @inkjs/ui
packages.description: Collection of customizable UI components for CLIs made with Ink

packages.name: @ioredis/commands
packages.description: Redis commands

packages.name: @mailwoman/address-id
packages.description: Turn a canonicalized + geocoded address into a stable, parseable primary key (`<state>.<H3-cell>.<hash>`) for deterministic record joins / dedup — the exact-match complement to the fuzzy matcher.

packages.name: @mailwoman/annotations
packages.description: The annotations composer — a native typed AnnotationSet, the Annotator interface, and OpenCage/native serializers. Each recipe package (timezone, un-locode, coordinate formats, country reference) implements Annotator; this composes them into the block the drop-in APIs return.

packages.name: @mailwoman/api
packages.description: The native Mailwoman HTTP API — engine-agnostic /v1 surface (parse, geocode, batch, resolve, format) with health, metrics, and an emitted OpenAPI document.

packages.name: @mailwoman/api-kit
packages.description: API plumbing for Mailwoman's HTTP surfaces — Hono node serve wrapper, OpenAPI emit helpers, shared wire atoms. Plumbing only: domain schemas live with their routes.

packages.name: @mailwoman/ban
packages.description: Base Adresse Nationale (France) rooftop address-point ingestion — builds the national FR precision shard on the situs address-point schema.

packages.name: @mailwoman/codex
packages.description: Per-address-system postal reference data + branded types (USPS street suffixes, US ZIP codes). Pure, zero-runtime-dep — the shared canonical home for postal-system primitives the parser, resolver, and synthesis layers all reach for.

packages.name: @mailwoman/core
packages.description: Mailwoman core: tokenization, decoder, formatter, resources, filters, utils.

packages.name: @mailwoman/corpus
packages.description: Mailwoman corpus pipeline: BIO-labeled dataset builder for the neural classifier.

packages.name: @mailwoman/formatter
packages.description: The inverse of the parser: render Mailwoman `ComponentTag` components into an idiomatic, locale-aware address string — plus a canonical, normalized match key for record linkage. Consolidates the former core/formatter stub and corpus synthesis formatter behind one API.

packages.name: @mailwoman/kind-classifier
packages.description: Stage 2.5 of the runtime pipeline — categorize inputs by query shape (postcode_only / locality_only / structured_address / intersection / po_box / landmark / vague). Rule-based for v1.

packages.name: @mailwoman/locale-gate
packages.description: Stage 2 of the runtime pipeline — derive a LocaleHint from QueryShape (script + known-format hits). Rule-based v1; trained classifier deferred to v0.6.0.

packages.name: @mailwoman/match
packages.description: The geocode-first record matcher: block → score → cluster. This first cut ships the string comparators (Jaro / Jaro-Winkler + an edit-distance fallback for compound surnames) that the Fellegi-Sunter scorer is built on.

packages.name: @mailwoman/neural
packages.description: Mailwoman neural classifier runtime: SentencePiece tokenizer + ONNX inference + decoder wiring.

packages.name: @mailwoman/normalize
packages.description: Stage 1 of the runtime pipeline — deterministic input preprocessing (Unicode NFC, punctuation, whitespace, abbreviation). Pure functions, no ML.

packages.name: @mailwoman/phrase-grouper
packages.description: Stage 2.7 of the runtime pipeline — propose coherent input units (boundary discovery) with a structural kind hypothesis + confidence. Rule-based v1 (port of v1 section/sub-section logic); learned 1-2M-param span proposer reserved for v0.5.1.

packages.name: @mailwoman/query-shape
packages.description: Cheap structural priors for the runtime pipeline: character class, segmentation, known-format detection. Pure functions, no ML.

packages.name: @mailwoman/record
packages.description: Lean, plain-TypeScript record schema + per-field normalizers for the geocode-first matcher. Address-first: the canonical PostalAddress record composes parser components, the formatter's match key, and a resolved geocode; organization + contact records build on the same canonical record.

packages.name: @mailwoman/registry
packages.description: The geocode-first record-matching application: resolve messy contact/organization records into canonical, geocoded entities (block → score → cluster) and export them as GeoJSON for spatial analysis. The clinic-funding use case mailwoman was built for.

packages.name: @mailwoman/resolver
packages.description: The address resolver: walk an AddressTree, decorate nodes with gazetteer-supplied coordinates + attribution. Backend-agnostic (any ResolverBackend), with the span-rescore + postcode-consistency levers. Lifted out of @mailwoman/core so it can depend on @mailwoman/spatial (haversine) + @mailwoman/codex (USPS directionals) instead of reinventing them; the type contract stays in core so the pipeline composes it without a cycle.

packages.name: @mailwoman/resolver-wof-sqlite
packages.description: Who's On First SQLite resolver — FTS5-backed PlaceLookup that resolves text queries to WOF place IDs + coordinates. Optional dependency for callers who want geocoding.

packages.name: @mailwoman/spatial
packages.description: Spatial analysis, geocoding, and other geo-related utilities.

packages.name: @mailwoman/tiger
packages.description: US Census TIGER/Line data processing and analysis.

packages.name: @napi-rs/nice
packages.description: https://linux.die.net/man/2/nice binding for Node.js

packages.name: @napi-rs/nice-linux-x64-gnu
packages.description: https://linux.die.net/man/2/nice binding for Node.js
